input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.2
            TITLE: frame member

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.2: Frame Member
F.1.2 Frame Member 
A minimum representative single piece of uncut, continuous tubing.

final_answer: rule F.1.2: Frame Member F.1.2 Frame Member A minimum representative single piece of uncut, continuous tubing.
